017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth;
018
019import java.security.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg.*;
024
025/**
026 * Resolves {@code @RestOp}-method parameters that represent the authenticated {@link Principal}.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Matches any of:
030 * <ul>
031 *    <li>Parameter annotated with {@link Auth} (any type).
032 *    <li>Parameter typed as {@link Principal} or any subtype (including {@link ClaimsPrincipal}).
033 * </ul>
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Resolution pulls the {@link Principal} stashed by an upstream AuthN guard
037 * ({@link BearerTokenGuard} / {@link ApiKeyGuard}) on the request attributes under
038 * {@link RestServerConstants#PRINCIPAL_ATTR}. If the stashed value is missing or not assignable to
039 * the requested parameter type, <jk>null</jk> is injected &mdash; the guard chain is the contract
040 * that guarantees a non-null value.
041 *
042 * <p>
043 * Type-driven resolution lets a bare {@code Principal} parameter be filled without an annotation,
044 * matching the Spring / Servlet convention; the {@link Auth} annotation is for clarity and for
045 * disambiguating against another arg resolver that might otherwise claim the parameter.
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
048 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Auth}
049 *    <li class='jc'>{@link BearerTokenGuard}
050 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ApiKeyGuard}
051 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerAuthGuards">AuthN Guards</a>
052 * </ul>
053 *
054 * @since 10.0.0
055 */
056public class AuthArg implements RestOpArg {
057
058   private static final AnnotationProvider AP = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE;
059
060   /**
061    * Static creator.
062    *
063    * @param paramInfo The Java method parameter being resolved.
064    * @return A new {@link AuthArg}, or <jk>null</jk> if the parameter is not eligible.
065    */
066   public static AuthArg create(ParameterInfo paramInfo) {
067      var hasAuth = AP.has(Auth.class, paramInfo);
068      var isPrincipal = paramInfo.getParameterType().isAssignableTo(Principal.class);
069      if (hasAuth || isPrincipal)
070         return new AuthArg(paramInfo);
071      return null;
072   }
073
074   private final Class<?> type;
075
076   /**
077    * Constructor.
078    *
079    * @param paramInfo The Java method parameter being resolved.
080    */
081   protected AuthArg(ParameterInfo paramInfo) {
082      this.type = paramInfo.getParameterType().inner();
083   }
084
085   @Override /* Overridden from RestOpArg */
086   public Object resolve(RestOpSession opSession) {
087      var v = opSession.getRequest().getAttribute(RestServerConstants.PRINCIPAL_ATTR).getValue();
088      if (v == null || ! type.isInstance(v))
089         return null;
090      return v;
091   }
092}
